.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.io.*; before import java.net.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant definitions for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH to single lines.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in final String assignments.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard Java coding style.
Adjusted indentation and line breaks in the Authenticator anonymous class definition.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Reformatted new Authenticator() block to align with surrounding code style.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted final newline character before closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to log statement to ensure proper log formatting and prevent injection issues.
Modify active profiles retrieval to fall back to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring consistent logging behavior.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style guides.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 compatibility.
Remove Zalando Problem modules from Jackson configuration, likely due to dependency removal or migration to a different error handling strategy in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with functional SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ API.
Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration to use the new functional API.
Refactor header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for Content Security Policy, Frame Options, and Permissions Policy.
Replace manual CorsFilter injection with a dedicated SpaWebFilter to handle SPA routing and CORS requirements.
Remove custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling in favor of standard Spring Security OAuth2 BearerToken handlers.
Remove custom JWTConfigurer application, likely moving JWT configuration to a separate filter or auto-configuration.
Externalize Content Security Policy directives to JHipsterProperties configuration instead of hardcoding them.
Simplify static resource location configuration by removing the redundant 'app' subdirectory path.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced generic path patterns like "/app/*" with specific extension patterns like "/*.js", "/*.css" and adjusted others.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify type checking and casting logic.
Remove try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java, simplifying code.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security CORS handling.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints, removing legacy Swagger 2 paths.
